appmesh.mesh.egressfilter.CfnAbout: An object that represents the egress filter rules for a service mesh.

appmesh.mesh.egressfilter.Type.Description: The egress filter type. By default, the type is `DROP_ALL`, which allows egress only from virtual nodes to other defined resources in the service mesh (and any traffic to `*.amazonaws.com` for AWS API calls). You can set the egress filter type to `ALLOW_ALL` to allow egress to any endpoint inside or outside of the service mesh.
